#base:
Automatically accepts the language dialog when the settings are opened, adds various keybinds (that may not work sometimes) to the panorama UI.

`F1`: DOTAShowHomePage - Navigates to the home page.
`F2`: DOTAShowHeroesPage - Navigates to the heroes page.
`F3`: DOTAShowPostGamePage - Navigates to the postgame page.
`F6`: DOTAScenarioPlayCoopBot - Queues a co-op bot match.
`F8`: DOTAShowSeasonalRewardsPage - Navigates to the seasonal rewards page.
`F9`: DOTAShowInternational2025Page - Navigates to The International page.
`F10`: DOTAShowSettingsPopup - Shows the old settings popup.
`F12`: DOTAShowAddFriendByAccountID - Shows the add friend dialog (SteamID3).
`Up Arrow & Middle Mouse`: DOTAToggleCurrentDashboardPageFullscreen - Hides top and bottom elements.
`ALT+F4`: DOTAQuitConfirmed - Allows you to use the generic quit hotkey.
Auto Accept Match:
Automatically accepts the match dialog after `0-40` seconds of delay. Delay is adjustable through settings panel.

!!: Defaults to `10` if workshop tools aren't installed.
Custom Backgrounds:
Replaces most backgrounds.

Drop an image or video named `background.<ext>` into the `config` folder. By default, it uses an image from Dota.

Formats below will be automatically converted if the tool exists:

- `magick`: `.jpg`, `.jpeg`, `.webp` (converted to `.png`)
- `ffmpeg`: `.mp4` (converted to `.webm`)
Custom Fonts:
Changes most if not all fonts, the fonts can be changed in the config manually.

!!: Some fonts may not work.
Custom Hero Grids:
Imports custom hero grids (without breaking your own) from a remote source or a local configuration file into your Dota 2 hero grid selection.

Available for viewing at https://egezenn.github.io/dota2-precompiled-grids

You can drop your own `hero_grid_config.json` into the mod's `config` folder to use it instead of the remote version.
Dark Terrain:
Designed for visual clarity.

!!: Default terrain is required.

- Makes all tiles gray/dark gray
- Fog lines
- Removed fog mist
- Dark water
- Custom team logos, shopkeepers
Minify Base Attacks: Reduces particles on auto attacks of ranged heroes.
Minify Spells & Items: Simplifies default spells and items in the game.
Misc Optimization:
Removes miscellaneous effects

- Removes particle effects on buildings such as the glowing blue effects on fountain, outpost, base buildings etc
- Tower attack projectile / destruction particles
- Effigy particles
- Simplified illusions
- Hero loadouts, event emblems, glyph..
Mute Ambient Sounds: Mutes ambient sounds of the map.
OpenDotaGuides Guides:
Replaces default guides with the ones from OpenDotaGuides.

!!: Requires default builds to be selected to see them in-game.

Source: https://github.com/Egezenn/OpenDotaGuides/releases/latest
Remove Foilage:
Removes all the bushes, flowers, rocks and any other ground props so there are only tiles.

!!: Default terrain is required.
Remove Hero Renders:
Removes hero previews, renders from the UI.

The console variable `map_enable_portrait_worlds 0` achieves the same goal, however you'll get stuck on MVP screens.
Remove River:
Removes all things related to rivers.

Including painting river with vial items, walking sound effects, particle splash effects.
Remove Weather Effects:
Removes all weather effects from weather items and from `cl_weather` console command.

https://liquipedia.net/dota2/Weather_Effects
Repopulate Unit Query HUD:
Fixes and repopulates the Unit Query HUD panel that was released in patch `7.00`.

Available with the console variable `dota_hud_new_query_panel 1`.
Reposition & Rescale HUD: Repositions & scales some aspects of the in-game HUD.
Revamp Hero Grid Layout:
Makes hero cards bigger.
Removes hero movies that appear on card hovers, badges and similiar heroes row.
Revert Ping Sounds:
Reverts pings sounds to their pre `7.39` patch sounds.

New sounds are replaced to:

- `ping_heart` = `ping`
- `ping_enemy_ward` = `ping_warning`
- `ping_need_ward` = `ping`
Show NetWorth: Shows your current networth in the quick stats panel.
Stat Site Buttons: Adds 3rd party website links (dotabuff, stratz, opendota) to the profiles of other players and matches.
Transparent HUD:
Makes most in-game HUD elements transparent, removes some useless features.

!!: While it's somewhat compatible with other HUDs, default is recommended.
Tree Mod:
Turns all trees into small circle bushes.

!!: Default terrain is required.
User Styles:
Add your own / modify & remove existing style snippets here.

These snippets might not be desirable for the majority. So read through what the snippet does and enable with caution.

You're required to make a `styling.css` file manually so that you don't run into any unexpected behavior.
